## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between GrowthX and Apex Fractional to explore potential collaboration opportunities and share business insights.](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX recently raised $12M Series A, targeting $22-23M revenue by year-end with potential $700M-$1B valuation](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Apex Fractional, run by Marcin and Tomek, offers flexible growth/AI consulting for Series A-C startups](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [GrowthX building AI agent for workflow automation as code, with robust learning engine and runtime infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Both companies navigating scale challenges; GrowthX actively hiring high-level talent (e.g., Managing Directors)](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Recent Developments

  - [GrowthX:](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Closed $12M Series A funding with favorable terms/valuation](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
      - [Projecting $22-23M revenue by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [Building internal AI agent for workflow automation as code](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Hiring top talent (e.g., ex-Airbnb, Stripe engineers; former TripAdvisor, G2, ClickUp execs)](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Apex Fractional:](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Founded by Marcin and Tomek, friends with extensive startup/exit experience](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Offering flexible growth/AI consulting to Series A-C startups](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Leveraging network from Stanford GSB and past ventures](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Exploring options to scale or pivot the business model](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)

### AI and Automation Approaches

  - [GrowthX developing proprietary system:](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [AI agent building workflows as code](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Robust runtime infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Learning engine for task optimization and domain-level improvements](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Aiming for paradigm shift in knowledge work automation](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Apex Fractional:](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Utilizing existing tools (e.g., AirOps) for client projects](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Implementing AI solutions for content creation, video extraction, Salesforce automation](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### Business Models and Scaling Challenges

  - [GrowthX:](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Offering managed services with embedded expertise and proprietary tech](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Justifying ongoing fees through strategy, execution, and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Facing work capacity constraints due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Apex Fractional:](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Providing flexible, high-impact consulting to growth-stage startups](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Balancing cash flow and lifestyle considerations with growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
      - [Exploring options to scale (e.g., hiring team in Poland, focusing on AI implementations)](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)

### Talent Acquisition and Compensation

  - [GrowthX:](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Hiring Managing Directors with 300k+ OTE and equity](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
      - [Emphasizing employee-friendly policies (e.g., competitive pay, potential liquidity events)](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
      - [Planning aggressive acquisitions of niche shops post-Series B](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)

## Next Steps

  - Apex to internally discuss priorities and potential collaboration with GrowthX
  - [GrowthX open to further conversations, including potential demo of proprietary technology](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
  - [Both parties to consider potential fit for Apex founders within GrowthX's expansion plans](https://fathom.video/share/9nYSzrYu-sZB7KosJV-_oT7rmn8CSoNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
